title: rubus × collinus var. hybridus
intro: Rubus × collinus var. hybridus, also known as hybrid dewberry or hybrid bramble, is a type of deciduous shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is a natural hybrid of the common dewberry (Rubus caesius) and the red-flowering bramble (Rubus idaeus). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × collinus var. hybridus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
